agribalyse.name_en: Soup, Asian-style with noodles, prepacked, to be reheated
agribalyse.name_fr: Soupe asiatique, avec pâtes, préemballée à réchauffer

ingredients_text:
pasta (90.8%) [wheat flour, palm oil, water, salt, color (beta-carotene)].
spices (9.2%) [salt, sugar, carrot, maltodextrin, flavor enhancer (monosodium glutamate, disodium inosinate, disodium guanylate), turmeric, aroma, acidity regulator: citric acid, onion (2.1%), parsley ( 2.0%), tomatoes (2.0%), chives, garlic, palm oil, pepper, celery, ginger, hot paprika]
